title: Better Old Netherrack
description: Tints the old netherrack texture to make it a little easier to look at.
body:
The old netherrack is quite hard to look at, so I fixed it by tinting it dark red.
Credits to PoeticRainbow for the old nether gold texture.
The Golden Days resource pack is reccomended.

Before:
![Before Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03f57da3f561ab99c21bdb98153b6beae9016804.png)

After:
![After Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/056943d868dc84b720306627d7eeb1f0711b2326.png)
